restrictions.outwardHtml:

E8.name: E8
E8.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays
E8.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Restrictions will be lifted for trains departing from and arriving at London Kings Cross on a Friday until further notice.

Restrictions will be eased on Monday 24th August 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased between 21st December 2026 and 1st January 2027 in both directions.

Evening restrictions will be lifted for trains departing London Kings Cross on Thursday 2nd April 2026 due to the Easter Bank Holiday weekend. Restrictions will be eased between Friday 3rd April 2026 and Monday 6th April 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased on Monday 4th May 2026 and 25th May 2026 in both directions.

Generally, Friday evening restriction easements apply on a Thursday before any Friday that is a Bank Holiday where travelling north from London Kings Cross.

 Restrictions will be eased on Monday 4th May 2026 and 25th May 2026 in both directions.
 Generally, Friday evening restriction easements apply on a Thursday before any Friday that is a Bank Holiday where travelling north from London Kings Cross.
